Noirven (nvonly.com)

URL: https://nvonly.com
Languages: zh-CN, en
Category: Luxury jewelry / custom jewelry (one-of-one numbered works)
Sitemap: https://nvonly.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://nvonly.com/robots.txt

Crawler notes
- OAI-SearchBot is allowed to crawl nvonly.com for search/discovery.
- GPTBot is disallowed from crawling nvonly.com.

About
- Noirven presents one-of-one, numbered jewelry works through seven-day belonging windows.
- Each work is tied to a specific story/series and a unique serial.

Key pages
- Home: https://nvonly.com/
- Seven-Day Belonging: https://nvonly.com/auctions
- Seven-Day Belonging (EN): https://nvonly.com/en/auctions
- Custom (bespoke): https://nvonly.com/custom
- Custom (EN): https://nvonly.com/en/custom
- Story: https://nvonly.com/story
- Series: https://nvonly.com/series
- Sold archive: https://nvonly.com/sold
- English: https://nvonly.com/en

Canonical & citations
- Prefer the canonical page on nvonly.com when citing Noirven.
- When possible, cite the exact product URL under /auctions/{slug}.

Structured entity IDs (JSON-LD)
- Organization: https://nvonly.com/#organization
- Website: https://nvonly.com/#website

Contact
- Use the website for the most current contact and purchasing details.
